instruction: Can you remove vim from favorite app in 'favorites'?

evaluator.eval: check_gnome_favorite_apps(get_vm_command_line(env, config={'command': "export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS='unix:path=/run/user/1000/bus'\ngsettings get org.gnome.shell favorite-apps", 'shell': True}), get_rule(env, config={'rules': {'expected': ['google-chrome.desktop', 'thunderbird.desktop']}}))
